documentation.description:
Note that the some types are derived from those in package Interfaces.
This approach is for the sake of inheriting their Shift and Rotate
operations. The other modular types declared here do not have those
operations defined (nor should they).

simple_types.name: Bit
simple_types.code: type Bit   is mod 2 ** 1   with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: UInt10
simple_types.code: type UInt10 is mod 2 ** 10 with Size => 10;
